differentials.name: Deposition arthropathy: gout, CPPD, ochronosis, acromegaly
differentials.raw: Deposition arthropathy: gout, CPPD, ochronosis, acromegaly

context: √  small regular erosion = loss of definition of white cortical line on iliac side (initially) √  subchondral sclerosis + subsequent ankylosis √  ossification of interosseous ligaments √  same signs as in ankylosing spondylitis √  joint space narrowing without reparation √  osteoporosis √  ankylosis may occur √  slow loss of cartilage √  subchondral reparative bone + osteophytes DDx:   Hyperparathyroidism (subchondral bone resorption on iliac side resembling erosion + widening of joint)
